scenario.name: SIPREC UAC - Full RTP Audio Load Test
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:src@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:srs@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:src@[local_ip]:[local_port];+sip.src> Require: siprec Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: multipart/mixed;boundary="siprec-boundary" Content-Length: [len]
--siprec-boundary Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=sipp 0 0 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=SIPREC Audio Load Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20 a=sendonly a=label:inbound m=audio [media_port+2] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20 a=sendonly a=label:outbound
--siprec-boundary Content-Type: application/rs-metadata+xml Content-Disposition: recording-session
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <recording xmlns='urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:recording:1'> <datamode>complete</datamode> <session session_id="sess-[call_number]"> <sipSessionID>[call_id]</sipSessionID> </session> <participant participant_id="caller-[call_number]"> <nameID aor="sip:caller[call_number]@sipp.test"> <name>Caller [call_number]</name> </nameID> </participant> <participant participant_id="callee-[call_number]"> <nameID aor="sip:callee[call_number]@sipp.test"> <name>Callee [call_number]</name> </nameID> </participant> <stream stream_id="stream-in-[call_number]" session_id="sess-[call_number]"> <label>inbound</label> </stream> <stream stream_id="stream-out-[call_number]" session_id="sess-[call_number]"> <label>outbound</label> </stream> <participantsessionassoc participant_id="caller-[call_number]" session_id="sess-[call_number]"/> <participantsessionassoc participant_id="callee-[call_number]" session_id="sess-[call_number]"/> <participantstreamassoc participant_id="caller-[call_number]"> <send>stream-in-[call_number]</send> <recv>stream-out-[call_number]</recv> </participantstreamassoc> <participantstreamassoc participant_id="callee-[call_number]"> <send>stream-out-[call_number]</send> <recv>stream-in-[call_number]</recv> </participantstreamassoc> </recording> --siprec-boundary--

ACK sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:src@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: [last_To] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:src@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:src@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: [last_To] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Contact: <sip:src@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
